title: Build a Page of Playing Cards
module: Build a Page of Playing Cards
description: A certification project displaying five playing cards (Ace through 5) built entirely with flexbox. Each card uses justify-content: space-between for the three columns, and each column uses align-self to anchor to the top, center, or bottom. The middle column uses flex-direction: column to stack suit symbols vertically.
objectives: Use display: flex with justify-content: space-between on each card
Use align-self: flex-start, center, and flex-end on the three card columns
Use flex-direction: column on the middle section to stack symbols
Use transform: rotate(180deg) to flip bottom corner labels
Use flex-wrap and gap on the container to lay out multiple cards
